title: Tooltopia
description: This mod adds 262 new armor and tool pieces made from almost every block including wood armor and bedrock tools offering both fun and serious options for all players
body:
### Tired of the same handful of armor and tools?

This mod expands Minecraft with 262 brand new armor sets and tool sets, crafted from many blocks and materials in the game.

We are still updating!

• Features

Craft gear from wood, stone, ores, decorative blocks, and even unusual materials like Bedrock.

Each material has unique durability, stats, and appearance – making every set different.

Mix and match pieces for style or strategy.

Balanced progression: from early-game wooden armor to powerful endgame gear.

Great for both survival and creative players who want more customization and variety.

• Examples

Walk around in a stylish glass armor set.

Use obsidian tools for extra durability.

Show off with shiny gold gear, or go silly with dirt armor.

• Technical

This mod must be installed on both client and server to work correctly (since it adds new items and recipes).

Compatible with NeoForge 1.21.4 (MCreator 2025.1).

With this mod, your inventory will never be the same – there’s always something new to craft and show off!
